text:
There was once a timid young hare who lived in a lush meadow filled with daisies. Every day he would hop around playing. One day, the fox saw him from afar.

"Ghhhhmmph." said the fox slowly.

The hare stopped hopping.

"Ahhhhhh!" he sighed.

The fox circled him like an owl.

"I love rabbits!" he snickered.

The hare froze.

"Don't worry," the fox lied.

He whispered.

"I'll hop hop hop... Just keep moving."

The hare scampered away, zigzagging. He zigzagged forever.

Later that day, the sun began to sink.

"Ppphtttings."

He climbed up a bush.

Suddenly, he saw big stars.

"One night fly!"

He darted upwards.

Upwards he went.

A rainbow arched over.

"The moon!"

He leaped.

Far beyond anything.

He saw the stars.

Sleep well tonight.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
